entry.title: Costco Connection Logo Ad Builder - September 2023
Trempette à l'oignon à la française

markdown_text.markdown_text: RECIPE COURTESY OF CHEF JILL HOUK

text_section_content.markdown_text:
- 185 mL (¾ cup) Kirkland Signature Sour Cream
- 185 mL (¾ cup) Kirkland Signature Mayonnaise
- 125 mL (½ cup) Kirkland Signature Organic Chopped Onion
- 5 mL (1 tsp) Worcestershire sauce
- 5 mL (1 tsp) onion powder
- 2 mL (½ tsp) mustard powder
- 1 mL (¼ tsp) Kirkland Signature Fine Ground Black Pepper
- 1 mL (¼ tsp) Kirkland Signature Granulated Garlic
- Potato chips and/or raw cut vegetables, for serving
Mix together all dip ingredients. Allow to sit for at least 20 minutes for onions to soften and flavours to blend. Serve with potato chips and/or veggies. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
